name: View
summary: The View class contains methods related to views. Views are views that contain other drawing objects, excluding other views. Views also contain drawing representations of model objects.

constructors.name: View
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems and part list.

constructors.name: View
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems and model area.

constructors.name: View
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems, part list and attributes file's filename.

constructors.name: View
constructors.summary: Creates a new view instance with the given coordinate systems, model area and attributes file's filename.

methods.name: Create3dView(Drawing, Point, View.ViewAttributes, View.)
methods.summary: Generates a new 3d view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

methods.name: Create3dView(Drawing, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, AABB, Point, View.ViewAttributes, View.)
methods.signature: Create3dView(Drawing, CoordinateSystem, CoordinateSystem, AABB, Point, View.ViewAttributes, View.)(...)
methods.summary: Generates a new 3d view on the sheet of the given active drawing using given view plane and display plane.

methods.name: CreateBackView
methods.summary: Generates a new back view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

methods.name: CreateBottomView
methods.summary: Generates a new bottom view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

methods.name: CreateCurvedSectionView
methods.summary: Generates a new curved section view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated section mark for the specified view.

methods.name: CreateDetailView
methods.summary: Generates a new detail view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated detail mark for the specified view.

methods.name: CreateFrontView
methods.summary: Generates a new front view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

methods.name: CreateSectionView
methods.summary: Generates a new section view on the sheet of the active drawing and the associated section mark for the specified view.

methods.name: CreateTopView
methods.summary: Generates a new top view on the sheet of the given active drawing.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the view and its children objects from the database.

methods.name: GetAllObjects.
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view.

methods.name: GetAllObjects(Type)
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view that are of a certain type.

methods.name: GetAllObjects(.Type.)
methods.summary: Gets all the objects and their children objects in the view that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: The view size in paper coordinates.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetDrawing
methods.summary: Gets the drawing where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetModelObjects.
methods.summary: Gets the model objects that are in the view.

methods.name: GetModelObjects(Identifier)
methods.summary: Gets the drawing model objects based on given model object identifier. If used from sheet model objects from all views are returned.

methods.name: GetObjects.
methods.summary: Gets the objects in the view. Does not return child objects (single dimensions, grid lines, views).

methods.name: GetObjects(.Type.)
methods.summary: Gets the objects in the view that are of certain types. Does not return child objects (single dimensions, grid lines, views).

methods.name: GetOriginalDrawing
methods.summary: Gets the drawing on which the view was originally created. @see DrawingObject.GetDrawing() for retrieving the current drawing the object resides on.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects.
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects(.Type.)
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(Dictionary.String, String..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, String..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetView
methods.summary: Gets the view where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetVisibleAreaRestrictionBoxes
methods.summary: Gets the restriction boxes that represent the visible areas of the view.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the view to the database.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the view in the database.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisX
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the X axis.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisY
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the Y axis.

methods.name: RotateViewOnAxisZ
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the Z axis.

methods.name: RotateViewOnDrawingPlane
methods.summary: Rotate the view on the drawings plane. This works just like the user interface command "Rotate view".

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the view from the database.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Changes the string presentation of the drawing object.

properties.name: DisplayCoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the display plane. This can be used to transform global points from the model that is to be inserted in the view.

properties.name: FrameOrigin
properties.summary: The vector from the view origin to the frame origin.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: The height of the view frame in paper coordinates.

properties.name: IsSheet
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the container view is the drawing's sheet.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: The view origin coordinates in the sheet.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: RestrictionBox
properties.summary: The axis aligned bounding box that represents the volume of the view.

properties.name: ViewCoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the view plane.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the view frame in paper coordinates.
